# Project State

Created: 2026-04-14
Project: React Data Grid Example

## Current status
- Root project initialization completed.
- Existing frontend/backend code discovered.
- Codebase map location: `.github/codebase/`

## Current phase
- Phase 01: Foundation

## Decisions
- Keep frontend and backend as separate packages for initial phase.
- Use `.github/codebase/` for generated codebase mapping.
- Accept in-memory mock backend data for the initial proof of concept.
- Plan to move API base URL configuration out of `/frontend/src/api.ts`.

## Notes
- No root git repo existed prior to initialization; a repository will be created in this directory.
- The workspace is currently brownfield with existing code in `/frontend` and `/backend`.
